function:app/src-tauri/src/discord_scanner/mod.rs:snapshot
        .messages
        .iter()
        .map(|message| {
            json!({
                "id": message.id,
                "sender": message.author,
                "sender_id": message.author_id,
                "body": message.body,
                "date": message.timestamp_ms.div_euclid(1000),
                "source_ref": message.source_ref,
            })
        })
        .collect::<Vec<_>>
